strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React (primary stack) with 6+ years in mid-senior roles, including leadership in pricing automation at Optilyz handling millions of operations annually
Direct AI-agent development experience at re:cinq, including MCP (Model Context Protocol) infrastructure and agentic workflows, aligning with the job's emerging tech requirement

Strong architecture and scalability focus demonstrated through Kubernetes deployment of GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform) and optimization of low-latency microservices handling millions of HTTP requests/sec
concerns: Primary stack expertise is skewed toward TypeScript/Node.js with limited explicit experience with Nest.js (though comparable frameworks like Express are used)
No direct mention of Vitest testing framework experience, though Jest and Playwright are referenced
Limited detail on cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) depth, with only AWS CDK mentioned; Docker is noted but Kubernetes is implied via GISCollective
response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates exceptional alignment with the Senior Fullstack Developer role through her 6+ years of full-stack experience in TypeScript/Node.js/React, with recent contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and a strong track record of building scalable, production-grade systems (e.g., low-latency microservices for data integration, Kubernetes-deployed geo-data platforms). Her architecture focus, cross-language proficiency (TypeScript, Java, Kotlin, Dlang), and customer-centric delivery (e.g., pricing automation for Optilyz) underscore her ability to translate user needs into technical solutions while adhering to best practices. While some secondary stack nuances (Nest.js, Vitest) are less explicit, her adaptability and depth in core technologies, coupled with her AI expertise, position her as a standout candidate.
